summary: Class stations transmit the most often, usually once

mechanics.name_guess: Class stations transmit the most often, usually once
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 183 > factions > Class stations transmit the most often, usually once
mechanics.excerpt: Class stations transmit the most often, usually once every six hours. Class stations transmit far less frequently: During Star League times_ they transmitted once every twelve hours; today most stations average transmissions only once every few days. The actual schedule depends Mainly on the number of waiting messages and how many other stations are within range Sometimes, transmissions can be agonizingly slow: message from Tharkad takes an average of six days to reach Terra; the same mes- sage might take months reach the Mos distant Periphery world.
